title: Bunnycat's Mizunos Tweaks
description: Brings slight tweaks to Mizuno 16 Craft to make a more appealing look and add details
body:
[early access]

Mizunos 16 Craft is a beautiful pack, but a few of its blocks could use a slight facelift. This pack will tweak existing blocks while adding features inspired by Vanilla Tweaks and similar packs.

This pack will include all of my tweaks in it. I will be releasing mini packs in case you like some packs and not others.

<details>
<summary>Current Features</summary>


+ Crimson wood items have been changed to be closer to vanilla color and more in touch with the feel of the rest of Mizunos
+ Ice blocks have had their ugly borders removed, now frozen lakes are seamless
+ Powder snow is more obvious so you don't fall in

</details>

<details>
<summary>Planned Features</summary>

+ Subtle recolor of most wood planks
+ Bringing polished andesite, diorite etc closer to vanilla appearance
+ Grass flowers similar to Simple Grass Flowers
+ Foliage features such as Moss Carpet having an overhang
+ And many more!

</details>


This pack requires Mizunos 16 Craft 1.20+ to work properly. It can be found on Planet Minecraft.

Recommended to be used alongside Modern Mizunos, Mizunos Tinkers Pack, and S33R Mizunos Tweaks. Should have broad compatibility with other Mizunos addons.
